translations.en: To someone wearing a new garment
May Allah replace it when it is worn out.

items.reference: Abu Dawud 4/41. See also Al-Albani Sahih Abu Dawud 2/760.

text.arabic:
اِلبَـس جَديـداً
وَعِـشْ حَمـيداً
وَمُـتْ شهيداً
text.transliteration:
Ilbas jadīdan,
wa `ish ḥamīdan,
wa mut shahīdan.

translations.en:
Put on new clothes,
live a praise-worthy life
and die as a martyr.

items.reference:
Ibn Majah 2/1178, Al-Baghawi 12/41. See also Al-Albani, Sahih Ibn Majah
2/275
